workflow_step: Freeze MVP scope and success criteria
purpose: Align stakeholders on what JMI will and will not do in phase one
what_happens: Team agrees on sources, layers, cadence, cost ceiling, and demo outcome
input_data: Business questions; budget cap; compliance constraints
processing_logic: Document MVP: Arbeitnow live API first; Bronze-Silver-Gold; optional AWS serverless path; dashboard for aggregates
output_data: Signed-off scope statement and run order expectations
why_this_step_exists: Prevents scope creep that breaks lineage or budget
failure_risk: Scope disagreements surface late
validation_check: Checklist: sources listed; layers named; cost cap noted
cost_impact: No AWS spend until account setup; only people time
beginner_explanation: You decide what problem the pipeline solves before touching cloud or code.

workflow_step: Assign owner for data, cloud, and analytics
purpose: Clarify who approves AWS changes, who runs local pipelines, who owns dashboards
input_data: Name owners for ingest code, IAM, Athena DDL, QuickSight, and cost alarms
dependencies: Avoids blocked deploys and silent config drift
failure_risk: Each area has a named approver
validation_check: Zero direct dollar impact
cost_impact: Like assigning who locks the doors versus who cooks dinner—fewer mistakes.

workflow_step: Clone repo; understand local versus AWS boundary
purpose: Developers install Python 3.11+; read README local execution order; note infra/aws is deployment-only
input_data: pip install -r requirements.txt; run modules in order ingest then silver then gold
processing_logic: Not applicable (local); later Lambda uses same modules
aws_service: Local workspace; data/ directory created on first run
storage_location: Runnable local pipeline matching production logic
dependencies: Same transforms in prod and dev reduce surprises
why_this_step_exists: Wrong Python version breaks pyarrow or pandas
failure_risk: python --version; pip check
validation_check: Free on laptop
cost_impact: You practice the recipe at home before cooking for a party.

workflow_step: Select Arbeitnow as first live source
purpose: Confirm API endpoint, rate limits, fields needed for job_id and raw_payload
what_happens: Public job board JSON over HTTPS
input_data: GET https://www.arbeitnow.com/api/job-board-api; parse data array
storage_location: List of job objects per pull
output_data: Network egress from Lambda or laptop
failure_risk: HTTP 200; non-empty data key
validation_check: Egress negligible; no S3 until ingest writes
cost_impact: Pick one faucet you trust before building the plumbing.

workflow_step: Plan batch CSV landing for backfill
purpose: Design expects future files in a controlled drop zone with schema contract
what_happens: Historical extracts from HR or job feeds
input_data: Validate headers; map to same Bronze envelope as API jobs; separate source= partition
dependencies: Enables trend baselines without rewriting Gold logic
failure_risk: Row count versus manifest; sample hash
validation_check: Storage pennies per GB-month; optional Glue crawlers
cost_impact: Old photo albums go in the same labeled box—just a different shelf.

workflow_step: Reserve design hook for macro or web trend feeds
purpose: Document that new feeds join via new source_slug and Bronze contract
input_data: Ingest as raw JSON or CSV without Silver cleaning; standardize only in Silver
dependencies: Avoids mixing unrelated semantics in one table
failure_risk: Legal review checklist
validation_check: Usually API fees plus storage; monitor with budgets
cost_impact: New thermometer in the house—still read it from the same hallway panel.

workflow_step: Enable MFA; dedicated profile; separate dev/prod if required
purpose: Human configures AWS CLI profiles and break-glass procedures
what_happens: IAM user or role with MFA; billing alerts
input_data: IAM; AWS Organizations (optional)
output_data: Stops accidental spend and credential leaks
why_this_step_exists: MFA on; no long-lived root keys
failure_risk: No compute yet; IAM free tier friendly
validation_check: Lock the front door before filling the house with furniture.

workflow_step: Attach budget alarm to account or project tag near the documented MVP cap
purpose: Create AWS Budgets threshold; SNS or email alert
input_data: Set threshold at agreed MVP ceiling; tag Lambdas and S3 for cost allocation
storage_location: Alarm subscriptions firing on forecast breach
dependencies: Micro-batch can still spike if misconfigured
failure_risk: Budget shows actual versus forecast
validation_check: Budgets and SNS mostly free at tiny scale; avoids runaway Lambda and S3
cost_impact: Smoke alarm for your AWS bill.

workflow_step: Create bucket with Bronze, Silver, Gold, quality, health prefixes; block public access
purpose: Terraform or Console creates bucket; encryption at rest
input_data: Partition-friendly key layout under bronze/ silver/ gold/ quality/ health/
dependencies: Central durable store for all layers
failure_risk: Block Public Access on; SSE-S3 or KMS
validation_check: About $0.023 per GB-month storage; requests pennies at MVP frequency
cost_impact: One big filing cabinet in the cloud for all pipeline folders.

workflow_step: Package ingest, silver, gold handlers with src.jmi modules and dependencies
purpose: Build zip or container; set env JMI_DATA_ROOT to s3://...; set chained function name vars
input_data: Deploy three functions: ingest invokes silver asynchronously; silver invokes gold
storage_location: Deployed functions with IAM execution roles
why_this_step_exists: Cold start latency; package too large
failure_risk: Test invoke with small payload
validation_check: Per-invocation millisecond billing; keep memory right-sized (for example 512–1024 MB trial)
cost_impact: Rent a worker that wakes up on a timer instead of paying 24/7 servers.

workflow_step: Attach rule rate(4 hours) targeting ingest Lambda; start DISABLED until validation
purpose: Create EventBridge rule; IAM role allows invoke Lambda
input_data: Rule triggers async Lambda invoke with static input JSON
why_this_step_exists: Infinite retry storms if downstream fails silently
failure_risk: Rule State=DISABLED until green run
validation_check: EventBridge custom bus negligible; invocations billed as Lambda
cost_impact: An alarm clock that calls the first robot in the chain.

workflow_step: Lambda roles read and write only required prefixes; EventBridge invoke only target functions
purpose: Attach JSON policies under infra/aws/iam to roles
input_data: Grant s3:GetObject and PutObject on prefixes; lambda:InvokeFunction on silver and gold; logs permissions
dependencies: Limits blast radius of a bug
failure_risk: Policy simulator pass for sample keys
validation_check: IAM free; wrong policy can increase data transfer—review paths
cost_impact: Give each robot a key that only opens its own drawers.

workflow_step: Engineer runs python -m src.jmi.pipelines.ingest_live for ad-hoc testing
purpose: Process pulls API; writes Bronze; updates health pointer
what_happens: Laptop; internet; empty or existing data/ tree
input_data: fetch_live_jobs then to_bronze_record per row then attach run_id and bronze_ingest_date
failure_risk: curl or script checks API reachable
validation_check: Zero AWS cost
cost_impact: Practice catching fish at the dock before loading the truck.

workflow_step: EventBridge fires ingest Lambda on cadence when enabled
purpose: Lambda handler calls same ingest_run(); then async-invokes silver with bronze path
input_data: ingest_handler uses boto3 lambda.invoke Event to silver with bronze_file and run_id
storage_location: Bronze objects plus downstream invoke payload
dependencies: Keeps lake fresh with no human cron
why_this_step_exists: Partial write if Lambda times out
failure_risk: CloudWatch Logs show success; manifest record_count greater than 0
validation_check: Four-hour cadence reduces invoke count versus aggressive polling; keep Lambda memory right-sized
cost_impact: The timer rings; the collector robot grabs new jobs and files them.

workflow_step: Ingestion stores raw_payload verbatim aside from envelope fields
purpose: Ensures Bronze stays an immutable snapshot of the source
input_data: Only add metadata: source, schema_version, job_id, timestamps, run lineage fields
failure_risk: Spot-check one record matches API
validation_check: No extra compute beyond gzip
cost_impact: Take a photo first; edit copies later—not the negative.

workflow_step: Each job gets stable hash-based id: slug then url then fallback text and time
purpose: Enables idempotent dedup downstream
what_happens: Raw fields slug, url, title, company, location, created_at
input_data: SHA-256 over canonical strings with strategy label stored
dependencies: Same job maps to same key across runs
failure_risk: Duplicate rate monitored in Silver checks
validation_check: CPU microseconds per row
cost_impact: Give every resume a barcode so duplicates are obvious.

workflow_step: Clarify when humans run locally versus when EventBridge runs in AWS
purpose: Developer laptop actions versus scheduled cloud
what_happens: Same Python modules; different triggers and JMI_DATA_ROOT target (local disk versus s3://)
input_data: Local: Not applicable; AWS: EventBridge plus Lambda
dependencies: Run same flow locally then AWS test invoke
failure_risk: Practice piano alone; concert is the automatic schedule.

workflow_step: Write gzip JSONL under source and ingest_date and run_id partitions
purpose: Organizes data for Athena partition pruning and lineage tracing
input_data: write_jsonl_gz to path template; local Path or s3:// via boto3 put_object
dependencies: Immutable layer for replay and compliance
why_this_step_exists: Disk full or S3 permission denied
failure_risk: File exists; byte size greater than 0; line count versus manifest
validation_check: S3 PUT and storage per GB; gzip reduces size
cost_impact: Labeled shoebox: which store (source) and which day and which batch (run_id).

workflow_step: Write manifest.json with counts, paths, schema_version
purpose: Operators verify batch completeness without scanning full file
input_data: json.dumps manifest next to raw.jsonl.gz
why_this_step_exists: Manifest out of sync with file
failure_risk: record_count matches decompressed lines
validation_check: One tiny extra object per run
cost_impact: Receipt taped to the outside of the shoebox.

workflow_step: Update latest_ingest.json summarizing newest batch
purpose: Dashboard and humans find latest run quickly
input_data: Overwrite health file at data/health/ or S3 equivalent
dependencies: Fast UX without scanning all partitions
failure_risk: Single writer per environment or use versioned key
validation_check: Negligible storage
cost_impact: Sticky note on the cabinet saying which box is newest.

workflow_step: run_id and bronze_ingest_date created once at ingest and propagated downstream
purpose: Guarantees aggregates tie to ingest batch not wall clock at transform
input_data: new_run_id(); date.isoformat(); stamp every record
failure_risk: NTP on Lambda; compare manifest versus CloudWatch timestamp
validation_check: No direct cost
cost_impact: Batch number on a factory line—every part remembers its shift.

workflow_step: Pick latest Bronze file by mtime or explicit path from Lambda chain
purpose: Silver always knows which raw batch it came from
input_data: Sort paths; take last; regex extract run_id and ingest_date from key
why_this_step_exists: Wrong file if sort logic wrong
failure_risk: Cross-check path matches manifest run_id
validation_check: No storage write yet
cost_impact: Grab the correct labeled box before sorting laundry.

workflow_step: Decompress JSONL; map raw_payload to typed columns; normalize skills
purpose: Convert semi-structured API JSON to analytics-friendly rows
input_data: read_jsonl_gz; build canonical columns; extract_silver_skills from tags title and description
dependencies: Silver is where cleaning belongs—not ingest
failure_risk: json.loads per line; fail loud in logs
validation_check: S3 GET cost negligible; pandas memory drives Lambda size
cost_impact: Spreadsheet view of messy notes.

workflow_step: drop_duplicates on job_id keep first
purpose: Removes duplicate postings within a batch
input_data: pandas drop_duplicates subset job_id
storage_location: Deduped DataFrame; counts for quality JSON
why_this_step_exists: Legit distinct jobs share same job_id if hash collides
failure_risk: duplicate_job_id must be zero in quality gate
validation_check: Memory and CPU only
cost_impact: Toss extra photocopies; keep one.

workflow_step: run_silver_checks must PASS or pipeline raises
purpose: Blocks bad batches before Gold curates wrong facts
input_data: Check non-empty; no missing title_clean or company_name; no duplicate job_id or source key
storage_location: silver_quality JSON plus PASS or FAIL
why_this_step_exists: False negatives if rules too strict
failure_risk: Review silver_quality JSON metrics
validation_check: Prevents expensive downstream recompute
cost_impact: Bouncer at the club: bad rows do not enter Gold.

workflow_step: Persist columnar file with lineage columns bronze_run_id bronze_ingest_date bronze_data_file
purpose: Parquet is efficient for Athena and pandas
input_data: write_parquet to jobs/ingest_date=.../run_id=.../part-00001.parquet
failure_risk: schema_version in manifest aligns with readers
validation_check: Storage often smaller than raw JSON; Athena scan cheaper
cost_impact: Clean laundry folded into labeled drawers.

workflow_step: silver_handler async-invokes gold Lambda with silver_file path
purpose: Keeps micro-batch pipeline serverless without Step Functions in MVP
input_data: boto3 lambda.invoke Event with silver_file and run_id
failure_risk: CloudWatch Errors metric on gold function
validation_check: One extra Lambda invoke per batch (fractions of a cent)
cost_impact: Pass the baton to the next runner automatically.

workflow_step: Read Silver; derive ingest_month YYYY-MM from bronze_ingest_date prefix
purpose: Gold partitions align to ingest month for Athena pruning—not the clock at Gold time
input_data: pd.read_parquet; validate required lineage columns; ingest_month equals first seven chars of bronze_ingest_date
dependencies: Gold-first analytics need stable time bucket
failure_risk: Length seven with hyphen at position four
validation_check: Read bytes plus CPU
cost_impact: Label charts by the month the data belongs to—not today’s date.

workflow_step: Explode skills; count distinct job_id per skill
purpose: Powers skill ranking visuals
input_data: explode; groupby skill nunique job_id; sort descending; attach lineage columns
dependencies: Business question: which skills appear most
failure_risk: row_count greater than zero or acceptable empty market
validation_check: Small Parquet; cheap scans
cost_impact: Count how many job ads mention each tool.

workflow_step: Group by normalized lower title_clean with counts
purpose: Shows role popularity without inventing categories
input_data: str lower strip; groupby size; lineage
dependencies: Separates title noise handling in Silver from rollups here
failure_risk: Dashboard truncates display only
validation_check: Similar cost profile to 7.2
cost_impact: Job title popularity scoreboard.

workflow_step: Normalize locations; group company_name lower
purpose: Geo and employer hiring signals
input_data: location normalization rules; groupby counts
failure_risk: Non-empty location rows optional
validation_check: Two small Parquet outputs per run
cost_impact: Where jobs are and who posts them.

workflow_step: Write pipeline_run_summary single-row parquet with row counts
purpose: Operators validate one object for batch health
input_data: Build summary DataFrame; write parquet
dependencies: Quick batch QA in SQL or QuickSight
failure_risk: Cross-foot counts versus Silver distinct jobs
validation_check: Tiny file cost
cost_impact: Report card for the whole batch.

workflow_step: Write gold_quality JSON listing outputs
purpose: Traceability for support tickets
input_data: json.dumps to quality folder
why_this_step_exists: Drift between JSON and actual keys
failure_risk: Automated diff versus S3 listObjects
validation_check: Negligible
cost_impact: Packing list shipped with the analytics box.

workflow_step: Expose S3 objects as queryable tables
purpose: S3 prefixes; column types
what_happens: Glue Crawler or manual DDL with partition keys source ingest_date run_id ingest_month
input_data: AWS Glue Data Catalog
processing_logic: Glue database; table locations point to s3://<bucket>/{bronze|silver|gold}/
output_data: Athena needs schema to read S3
why_this_step_exists: Start with explicit DDL for Silver and Gold Parquet
failure_risk: Crawler cost low at MVP; pay per DPU-minute if heavy crawler
validation_check: Library card catalog telling Athena where each dataset lives.

workflow_step: Analysts query curated tables before hitting raw Bronze
purpose: Business question
what_happens: SELECT from gold_skill_demand_monthly WHERE ingest_month equals chosen month
input_data: Amazon Athena
aws_service: Result sets for BI or ad hoc
output_data: Gold-first reduces scanned bytes and cost
dependencies: Full table scan if partition filter omitted
failure_risk: About five dollars per TB scanned; partitioning keeps MVP scans small
validation_check: Ask questions in SQL; pay only for data you actually read.

workflow_step: Analysts filter by run_id or ingest_month for reproducible numbers
purpose: Match dashboard to specific batch
input_data: WHERE run_id optional; standardize a view for latest run
failure_risk: Document standard latest-run view
validation_check: Smaller scans lower cost
cost_impact: Show me numbers for this shipment only—not mixed boxes.

workflow_step: source ingest_date or ingest_month run_id align to S3 prefixes
purpose: Partition pruning limits scan
input_data: Define PARTITIONED BY in DDL matching Hive-style folders
aws_service: MSCK REPAIR TABLE or partition projection parameters
failure_risk: SHOW PARTITIONS lists expected values
validation_check: Lower scan equals lower Athena bill
cost_impact: Index tabs on folders so the librarian opens only one drawer.

workflow_step: Product owners see charts without AWS BI yet
purpose: Latest gold Parquet files on disk
what_happens: Streamlit reads newest part-00001.parquet per dataset root by sorted path
input_data: Not applicable (local process)
dependencies: Stale files if pipeline not rerun
why_this_step_exists: Caption shows source path in UI
failure_risk: Free on laptop
validation_check: Prototype slideshow before printing posters.

workflow_step: Connect QuickSight SPICE or direct query to Athena Gold views
purpose: Enterprise sharing and scheduled refresh
what_happens: Athena workgroup; IAM QuickSight service role
input_data: Create dataset pointing to Athena view of latest run or SPICE incremental refresh
failure_risk: Row-level security if multi-tenant later
validation_check: QuickSight per-user or session charges; minimize SPICE with Gold-only datasets
cost_impact: Publish the magazine edition; readers do not rerun SQL.

workflow_step: BI tools should consume Gold tables or Athena views wrapping Gold
purpose: Protects cost and semantic consistency
input_data: Create VIEW latest_gold_skills AS SELECT with MAX(ingest_month) or explicit run filter
dependencies: Gold-first analytics principle from project rules
why_this_step_exists: Accidental direct Bronze scans on every refresh
failure_risk: QuickSight dataset source equals view not raw JSON
validation_check: Avoids multi-GB scans per dashboard refresh
cost_impact: Serve cake slices; do not hand guests the flour sack.

workflow_step: Capture stack traces and record counts for each stage
purpose: Lambda executions
what_happens: Structured logging of run_id and S3 paths
input_data: Amazon CloudWatch Logs
failure_risk: First GB ingestion often in free tier; tune retention days
validation_check: Black box flight recorder for each robot.

workflow_step: Persisted metrics: missing fields, dup counts, row counts
purpose: Silver transform output
what_happens: Compare pre and post dedup counts; write JSON to quality/
input_data: Amazon S3 or local
output_data: Objective gate between Bronze and Gold
why_this_step_exists: CI or Lambda alarm on non-PASS
failure_risk: Tiny storage
validation_check: Report card after cleaning class.

workflow_step: Capture each gold output path and aggregate row counts
purpose: Gold transform output
what_happens: Write gold_quality JSON after all parquet writes
input_data: Amazon S3 or local
why_this_step_exists: List bucket keys match JSON entries
failure_risk: Negligible
validation_check: Inventory checklist after packing analytics boxes.

workflow_step: Before enabling schedule, run one end-to-end with EventBridge disabled
purpose: Operators trigger Lambdas manually from console or CLI
what_happens: Compare manifest, silver_quality PASS, gold_quality counts versus Athena SELECT
input_data: AWS Lambda console test invoke
failure_risk: One-time engineer time; minimal AWS cents
validation_check: Dress rehearsal before opening night.

workflow_step: Monthly verify actual versus budget; tune Lambda memory and Athena queries
purpose: Billing console; Cost Explorer
what_happens: Tag-based filters; right-size functions; review data transfer
input_data: AWS Cost Explorer; AWS Budgets
failure_risk: Potential dollars if misconfigured
validation_check: Monthly weigh-in so the project stays on a diet.

workflow_step: Add source=<new> in Bronze path without merging unrelated raw
purpose: Ingest connector for new API or file
input_data: Reuse envelope: source field; raw_payload; deterministic id function per vendor rules
why_this_step_exists: Mixed schemas in one source folder
failure_risk: Separate connectors and tests per source
validation_check: Linear storage growth; optional separate crawlers
cost_impact: New grocery aisle; do not pour cereal into the milk fridge.

workflow_step: Extend Silver mapping functions; shared quality rules
purpose: Bronze rows from multiple sources
what_happens: Branch on source column for field mappings; unify to common Silver schema
input_data: Not applicable
output_data: Single Gold SQL and BI layer across sources
why_this_step_exists: Silver quality metrics by source dimension
failure_risk: Slightly higher Lambda time
validation_check: Translate every language into one dictionary before counting words.

workflow_step: Add source column already propagated; optional split dashboards
purpose: Unified Silver
what_happens: Keep groupbys; allow filter source= in Athena and QuickSight
input_data: Amazon Athena; Amazon QuickSight
processing_logic: Gold partitions unchanged; filter column source on read
output_data: Users see blended or sliced metrics
dependencies: Double counting if job_ids collide across vendors
why_this_step_exists: Prefix job_id namespace per source in hashing at Bronze
failure_risk: Athena costs grow with rows—partition discipline matters
validation_check: Mix paint colors carefully or keep swatches separate.

workflow_step: Batch loader writes Bronze same layout; larger partitions possible
purpose: CSV files plus manifest
what_happens: Stream read; validate; wrap rows as raw_payload dicts
input_data: AWS Lambda or AWS Glue job (choice depends on file size)
why_this_step_exists: Use Glue job or staged chunks
failure_risk: Glue job DPU-minutes if used; otherwise Lambda GB-seconds
validation_check: Empty the attic boxes into the same labeled storage system.

workflow_step: Show live ingest to S3 layers to Athena query to dashboard visuals
purpose: Sample run_id
what_happens: Walk through manifest, silver_quality PASS, gold parquet summary, Athena SELECT, Streamlit or QuickSight
input_data: Amazon Athena; Amazon QuickSight; Amazon S3; AWS Lambda
failure_risk: Demo cost near zero if scans stay small
validation_check: Movie trailer: beginning hook, middle proof, ending insight.

workflow_step: Document schedule toggle, rollback (disable rule), teardown steps
purpose: Runbook readers
input_data: Not applicable
output_data: Team can operate without original author
why_this_step_exists: Checklist: disable EventBridge; optional empty test bucket
failure_risk: Teardown saves ongoing storage cents
validation_check: Leave the recipe card on the fridge for the next cook.

workflow_step: New hire reads rows sequentially to learn lifecycle
purpose: This document
what_happens: Follow phases 1 through 12; map rows to src/jmi and infra/aws
input_data: Not applicable
failure_risk: Zero infrastructure cost
validation_check: A map before a road trip beats only a steering wheel.
